hero.headline: Every supplier decision, documented like it will be audited.

items.title: Contract register
items.desc: Every agreement with its owner, renewal date, notice period, and negotiated terms. Renewal alerts go out at 120, 90

items.title: Risk register
items.desc: Vendor security reviews on a fixed cadence, scored against your own framework. Expired attestations block new spend

items.title: Spend register
items.desc: Committed spend against actual invoices, per vendor and per cost centre, reconciled nightly from your ERP. Variances

items.title: Decision register
items.desc: Who approved what, when, and on what evidence. Every approval carries its supporting documents, so an audit request is

items.title: Import
items.desc: Historical contracts, owners, and renewal dates loaded from your existing spreadsheets and drives. We have imported

items.title: Reconcile
items.desc: ERP connection goes live and the spend register reconciles against your last two closed quarters until the variances

about.body: Loopdesk is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Product Demo
features: See it working on your data.

items.a: Yes — start free and upgrade when your team is ready.
Most teams connect their first repo in under an hour.
Annual plans include two months free — ask on signup.
